arts.ttl: Liverpool Poised to Rival Man City, Man Utd for Nine-Goal Contributor After PSG Exit
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain initially opted for a short-term solution by loaning Xavi Simons to RB Leipzig for another season. However, his future is now settled, as the German club has secured him on a permanent transfer. arts.ttl: PSG Reopens Contract Talks with Donnarumma Amid Inter Milan Interest
arts.sum: Paris Saint-Germain have resumed efforts to secure Gianluigi Donnarumma's future with a new contract. The Italian goalkeeper, who joined PSG on a free transfer from AC Milan in the summer of 2021, is currently tied to the French champions until June 2026, earning up to €10 million net annually including bonuses.
